## How to verify

<!-- Concrete steps a reviewer can run. Screenshots / screencaps for UI changes. -->

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [ ] `cargo check` clean (if Rust changed)
- [ ] Tested on at least one provider end-to-end (if generation flow changed)
